author: poojaranjan
content:
I agree.
 
While devnet-7 EIPs satisfy most of the critieria to ascertain whether an EIP is mature (stable) enough to move to SFI, I agree that stage changes should have been ratified on ACDE or ACDC before assigning SFI status.

In fact, part of me was not happy to skip the stage change from PFI to CFI. I think your PR very well addressed it. Thank you !

> we can do this on Thursdays ACD also to explicitly move all these EIPs to SFI. 

💯

author: jochembrouwer
content: Thanks Pooja 🙂 I should have first thoroughly checked the PR before "promoting" it here (to get it merged), only to correct it later 😅  Lesson learned 😄
